Class Game

  • java.lang.Object
    • Game

  • public class Game
extends java.lang.Object
    Simulates a simplified game of Egyptian Rat Slap using players, a dealer, and a center pile.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Game()
      Creates a default game with two players and deals the full deck evenly between them.
      Game(int numPlayers)
      Creates a game with the given number of players and deals the full deck among them.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static boolean doubles(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
      Checks whether the two newest cards in the pile have the same rank.
      Dealer getDealer()
      Returns the dealer used by this game.
      java.lang.String[] getPattern()
      Returns the valid slap patterns for this game.
      java.util.LinkedList<Card> getPile()
      Returns the current center pile.
      java.util.LinkedList<Player> getPlayers()
      Returns the list of players in turn order.
      int play()
      Runs the Egyptian Rat Slap simulation until one player has all 52 cards.
      static boolean sandwich(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
      Checks whether the newest card matches the card two positions below it.
      static boolean topBottom(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
      Checks whether the newest card in the pile matches the first card played in the pile.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Game

        public Game()
        Creates a default game with two players and deals the full deck evenly between them.

      • Game

        public Game(int numPlayers)
        Creates a game with the given number of players and deals the full deck among them.
        Parameters:
        numPlayers - the number of players in the game

    • Method Detail

      • play

        public int play()
        Runs the Egyptian Rat Slap simulation until one player has all 52 cards.
        Returns:
        the player number of the winning player

      • getPlayers

        public java.util.LinkedList<Player> getPlayers()
        Returns the list of players in turn order.
        Returns:
        the list of players

      • getPile

        public java.util.LinkedList<Card> getPile()
        Returns the current center pile.
        Returns:
        the pile of cards currently in play

      • getDealer

        public Dealer getDealer()
        Returns the dealer used by this game.
        Returns:
        the game's dealer

      • getPattern

        public java.lang.String[] getPattern()
        Returns the valid slap patterns for this game.
        Returns:
        the array of valid pattern names

      • topBottom

        public static boolean topBottom(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
        Checks whether the newest card in the pile matches the first card played in the pile.
        Parameters:
        pile - the current center pile
        Returns:
        true if the top-bottom pattern is present, false otherwise

      • doubles

        public static boolean doubles(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
        Checks whether the two newest cards in the pile have the same rank.
        Parameters:
        pile - the current center pile
        Returns:
        true if the doubles pattern is present, false otherwise

      • sandwich

        public static boolean sandwich(java.util.LinkedList<Card> pile)
        Checks whether the newest card matches the card two positions below it.
        Parameters:
        pile - the current center pile
        Returns:
        true if the sandwich pattern is present, false otherwise
